title: Baseline gates recovery: Oreshnik alpha.9, identity v2, Prisma, typecheck, build and canonical suite
validationExpectations: Oreshnik alpha.9 tarball hash is the certified canonical artifact
Identity v2 align is idempotent without force
Run A uses operator manuel, harness codex and instance manuel-codex1
All terminal HeptaCore gates pass from this worktree
acceptance: resume of the same Run is verified
claims, locks, reservations and dispatcher worktrees are clean after close

history.description: Registered from P-HC-OR-OPERABILITY-01 Run A contract after verifying Oreshnik dispatch would otherwise select ASSET-02.
Run A gates passed: npm ci, Prisma generate, Prisma validate, typecheck, build, worker:validate, canonical test suite
Run A alpha.10 validation: package vendored from certified tarball; npm ci, Prisma generate/validate, typecheck, build, worker validation and full canonical suite pass.

Run A alpha.11 validation: Oreshnik alpha.11 vendored from certified tarball; npm ci, Prisma generate/validate, typecheck, build, worker validation and full canonical suite pass.; typecheck passed; build passed; worker passed; tests passed
